method: ffmpeg frame extraction + PIL warm-ratio (R-B) FB detector + vision reads of roster screen, DAMAGE-counter and popup crops.
roster_confidence: HIGH (read directly from Battle Records screen)
chain_note: LM(I) -> Crown(II) -> III. Two Burst-III units present (Jill + Helm).

full_bursts.detector: warm-ratio (frame R-mean minus B-mean) > 18 for >=1.5s; FB windows show warm ~24-30 vs ~5-12 between
full_bursts.spacing_s: ~14-15s between FB starts; each ~10s FB (warm-visible portion ~8-8.5s)
full_bursts.note: An earlier 7.5-8.5s warm blip is fight-start, not a FB. FB1 (first real) at video ~16s = fight ~9s.

burst_window.forced_reload: CONFIRMED - Jill shows 000 ammo + RELOADING at FB ends (burst removes 100% bullets then fixed +99.96% reload speed)
burst_window.jill_bursts_during_FB: shows burst-magnitude core hits during FB (FB1/FB2/FB3/FB8 sampled, all >=1.3M cores)
burst_window.jill_burst_every_FB_ambiguous: with two Burst-III units (Jill+Helm) it is unclear whether Jill bursts all 11 FBs or alternates with Helm; not resolved from sampling - FLAG
burst_window.burst_jump: burst-window core hits ~1.3-1.65M vs solo core 221,431 => ~6-7x, reflecting Jill burst (+75% AD + normal-attacks-True-Damage + Hit Rate +80.78%) stacked on LM/Crown/Helm persistent buffs
burst_window.confidence: MEDIUM (per-shot values partly glare/cut; jump direction + forced reload HIGH)

raw_damage_counter_samples.note: top-center TEAM total (all 4 units). video_s -> total
